title: Case File
description: Everything you need as a detective
story:
Victor Hale is dead.

A powerful tech entrepreneur, found lifeless in his own penthouse late at night.

No forced entry. No signs of struggle. Just a quiet, calculated murder.

You arrive at the scene. Something feels off.

Security logs confirm it—only three people had access to the penthouse that night.

And now, they sit before you.
howToPlay: Understand the case by reviewing the situation and each suspect’s background. Interrogate every suspect about alibis, motives, and relationships. Compare what they say and watch for contradictions. Pick up clues as they surface during questioning. When you are ready, make one accusation and choose a single suspect as the murderer.
